name: Golden Triangle Tour with Ranthambore
overview: Explore the best of Delhi, Agra, Jaipur, Ranthambore with our expertly crafted tour package. Mother India Tour Travels provides comfortable AC vehicles, experienced guides, and hand-picked accommodations to make your journey unforgettable.
inclusions: Accommodation in listed or similar hotels
All transfers and sightseeing by private AC vehicle
All long distance travel as per itinerary
Chauffeur, Toll Taxes, Parking, Fuel charges
State Taxes, Green Taxes, Road Taxes
exclusions: Personal expenses (porterage, tips, laundry, mineral water)
Monument entrance fees and camera charges
Any activity not mentioned in inclusions
Additional cost due to flight cancellation, roadblocks, political unrest
notes: Taj Mahal is closed every Friday
Prices are per person on twin sharing basis

itinerary.title: Delhi: Arrival at Delhi Airport company representative assist you and transfer t
itinerary.description: Delhi: Arrival at Delhi Airport company representative assist you and transfer to the hotel. After breakfast proceed to visit Old Delhi & New Delhi. Overnight stay at hotel.

itinerary.title: Delhi to Agra (230 Kms
itinerary.description: Delhi to Agra (230 Kms. 3 Hrs.): Today, after breakfast proceed to Agra & check in the hotel & proceed to visit Taj Mahal, Agra Fort and Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Agra to Ranthambore (280 Kms
itinerary.description: Agra to Ranthambore (280 Kms. 7 Hrs. Approx.): After breakfast drive to Ranthambore En-Rout visit Fatehpur Sikri . Overnight stay at hotel.

itinerary.title: Ranthambore to Jaipur (180 Kms
itinerary.description: Ranthambore to Jaipur (180 Kms. 3 Hrs.): Early morning start your Jungle safari tour (own cost) after breakfast drive to Jaipur & overnight stay at the hotel

itinerary.title: Ranthambore to Jaipur (180 Kms
itinerary.description: Ranthambore to Jaipur (180 Kms. 3 Hrs.): Early morning start your Jangle safari tour (own cost) after breakfast drive to Jaipur &visit ancient capital of Amber. Visit beautiful Amber Fort after Amber Fort proceed to the pink city Jaipur we will visit Water Palace, Hawa Mahal (Window Palace), City Place and Observatory (Jantar Mantar) after visit famous block printing & James & Stone cutting factory work being done since centuries in Jaipur. Overnight stay at hotel.

itinerary.title: Jaipur to Delhi ( 260 Kms
itinerary.description:
Jaipur to Delhi ( 260 Kms. 6 Hrs. Approx.): After breakfast proceed to Delhi & drop you at the airport/Railway station with sweet memories.
Please note: Taj Mahal Closed on every Friday
Please note: We can arrange tailor-made tours

Royal Travel Tips
Essential advice for your Rajasthan journey
Best Time to Visit
October to March
is ideal for Rajasthan travel. Days are pleasant (15-25°C) and nights are cool.
Avoid summer (April-June) when temperatures exceed 40°C. Monsoon (July-Sept) brings relief but can disrupt travel.
What to Pack
Light cotton clothing for daytime
Warm layers for coo
